name: Spring Magic Enchanted Wardrobe
description: Immerse yourself in the magical world of the game, where two amazing heroines are waiting for you - a centaur princess and a fairy princess, each of whom has her own special fashion style. Create unique looks for them by choosing from a variety of makeup options, hairstyles, accessories and a variety of spring outfits inspired by nature itself. Live out your fantasies and create your own fairy tale in the world of fashion and magic!
instructions: The magical world of fairies and centaurs welcomes spring and you as a fashion stylist will make this event bright and memorable The result of your labors can be saved as a PNG image at the end of the game Depending on the gaming device either a cli
